theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Command Center / Control Room)
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A B2B seller operations dashboard prioritizing data density, operational status monitoring, and extensibility. A dark 'control room' environment maximizes contrast for statuses, eliminates visual clutter, and feels authoritative and tactile.

rules.headings: Use 'Outfit' with tracking-tight. No larger than text-4xl for page titles.
rules.body: Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for readability in dense UI sections.
rules.data: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all numerical data, status pills, table cells, metric KPIs, and dates. This aligns columns perfectly and feels highly technical.

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Fixed width (w-64), full height (h-screen), 1px solid right border. Highly compact vertical navigation.
layout_and_spacing.page_container: pl-64 (to accommodate sidebar), p-6 or p-8 for main content area.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Zero soft shadows. Use 1px solid borders (`border-border`) with sharp or extremely subtle rounding (`rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`). Avoid 'floating' cards; components should feel anchored like hardware panels.

tables.style: Extremely dense. No rounded corners on the table wrapper. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for numbers. Left-align text, right-align numbers.
tables.borders: Horizontal borders only (`border-b border-[#2A2A2A]`). No vertical grid lines.

status_badges.style: Tactical outline. Transparent background with 10% opacity of the status color, 1px solid border of the status color, and text in the status color. Font: JetBrains Mono text-xs uppercase.

buttons.primary: Solid Volt Blue (#007AFF), text white, rounded-sm, font-medium.

charts.style: Minimalist axes, solid Volt Blue and pure white lines. Remove heavy grid lines, use faint #2A2A2A dashed lines if necessary.

forms_inputs.style: Dark background (#141414), 1px border (#2A2A2A). Focus state MUST use ring-1 ring-[#007AFF] with zero outline offset to feel precise.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Instantaneous color shifts (transition-colors duration-150) to feel highly responsive and technical.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use mono-spaced 'ASCII-style' loaders (e.g., [ ///... ] or blinking cursor) or linear determinate progress bars at the top of cards instead of generic spinners.
motion_and_interactions.data_entry: When a job is submitted, use a subtle flash animation on the new table row to indicate live ingestion.

media_and_assets.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react). Use 'regular' or 'bold' weight for sharp legibility at small sizes.

login_background.description: CSS-based dark grid pattern to represent a tactical terminal.

image_urls.description: Yellow towel and cleaner (placeholder for home goods product)
Samsung Galaxy device (placeholder for electronics product)

testing_and_accessibility.test_ids: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based. Examples: data-testid='submit-job-button', data-testid='sidebar-jobs-link', data-testid='job-status-badge', data-testid='products-table-row'.
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text (#FFFFFF) over dark surfaces (#141414) for maximum readability. Muted text must not drop below #71717A.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/Tailwind for structural layout. Use customized Shadcn for complex interactives (Tables, Dialogs, Selects, Charts).
Implement the CSS grid background for the Login page as specified in media_and_assets.
Adhere strictly to the 'Performance Pro' Archetype. DO NOT introduce soft purples, teals, or glassmorphism. Keep it tactical, precise, and flat with 1px borders.
Ensure the sidebar navigation is built as an extensible list, anticipating future modules.
For the Animated Rating Distribution on the product detail page, use simple flex-based horizontal progress bars colored by status/accent variables, rather than a bulky chart library component.
ALL numbers, dates, and metric data MUST be wrapped in tags applying the 'JetBrains Mono' font family.
